_meta.source: All values transcribed from baseline_2 (front + back). The verifier reports beverage_type 'beer' for malt.
_meta.note: Top-level keys are the COMPLETE set of mandatory label items for a malt beverage. verify() consumes brand_name, class_type, alcohol_content, net_contents, name_and_address, country_of_origin; the rest are part of the application for completeness (see _checklist).

class_type: Ale with Honey and Huckleberry Flavor
statement_of_composition: Ale with Honey and Huckleberry Flavor
name_and_address: Brewed & Bottled By Malt & Hop Brewery, Hyattsville, MD
health_warning: GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.

brand_name.verifier_checks: partial (fuzzy vs brand/fanciful union; brand vs fanciful-name read is unstable)

fanciful_name.applies: conditional - OPTIONAL in general; REQUIRED only when the malt beverage is not known to the trade under a particular class/type and uses the distinctive-name + statement-of-composition designation path (approved formula). A fanciful name alone does NOT satisfy the class/type designation.
fanciful_name.verifier_checks: no (now a DEDICATED evidence-only extraction field 'fanciful_name'; should match the application 'Fanciful Name'; NOT consumed by verify() -> reviewer-only / not verifier-judged)

class_type.applies: yes - the designation (a class/type OR a distinctive name + statement of composition) is universally required

statement_of_composition.applies: conditional - REQUIRED when using the distinctive/fanciful-name + composition designation path (e.g. flavored/formula products); applies here ('Ale with Honey and Huckleberry Flavor')
statement_of_composition.verifier_checks: no (now a DEDICATED evidence-only extraction field 'statement_of_composition'; NOT consumed by verify() -> reviewer-only / not verifier-judged)

alcohol_content.applies: conditional - TRIGGERED here (alcohol from added honey/huckleberry FLAVOR); also mandatory if a State requires it
alcohol_content.verifier_checks: yes (numeric match + NOTATION now checked; the flavor TRIGGER is NOT modeled, so a missing flavored-malt ABV would wrongly PASS)

net_contents.verifier_checks: partial (unit-aware VOLUME compare incl. compound '1 PINT 0.9 FL OZ'; largest-whole-unit / U.S.-customary FORMAT rule not validated)

name_and_address.applies: yes (domestic - bottler; per the checklist this is conditional on being wholly fermented in the U.S.)
name_and_address.verifier_checks: partial (punctuation/relationship-prefix-normalized fuzzy + coverage guard; no-intervening-text not checked; on this product the block is on the FRONT label)

health_warning.verifier_checks: yes (exact wording + ALL-CAPS + S/G deterministic; BOLD confidence-gated and run-to-run unstable; checked from the label)

_layout_typography_structural.designation_separate_and_apart: 27 CFR 7.52(b) - the designation must be separate and apart from other info -> structural / out-of-scope
_layout_typography_structural.health_warning_single_statement: 27 CFR part 16 - the warning must be one statement -> structural / out-of-scope
_layout_typography_structural.health_warning_separate_and_apart: 27 CFR part 16 - warning separate and apart from other info -> structural / out-of-scope
_layout_typography_structural.health_warning_bold_typography: 27 CFR part 16 - 'GOVERNMENT WARNING' CAPS + BOLD and S/G capitalization; caps + S/G deterministic, BOLD confidence-gated and machine-unreliable -> reviewer-leaning
_layout_typography_structural.aspartame_caps_separate_and_apart: 27 CFR 7.63(b)(4) - IF aspartame used, declaration in CAPITALS, separate and apart (n/a here)

_not_applicable.formula_number: UNMODELED - flavored malt likely requires an approved formula; application-side data not modeled
